message:
feat(supervision): add supervision tree policies and config

Implements bd-2581: Supervision trees with policies, strategies, and backoff.

Added types:
- RestartPolicy enum (OneForOne, OneForAll, RestForOne)
- EscalationPolicy enum (Stop, Escalate, ResetCounter)
- SupervisionConfig with full builder pattern
- ChildSpec for supervised child actors

Added 10 new tests for the new types.

Closes bd-2581.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
